visualSamplesReviewed.notes: Schema registry list renders populated cards, status badges, search controls, and primary action without incoherent overlap.
Schema submission success state is readable and contained.
Initial audit found React Flow controls overlapping the DAG nodes. The final regenerated screenshot shows controls below the graph row with nodes visible.
DagVisualizationPage renders React Flow nodes rather than Mermaid text; controls no longer occlude the node row.

fixesApplied.summary: Increased fitView padding to 0.35 and moved controls to bottom-right with the nonessential interactivity toggle hidden to avoid node overlap.
Raised FLOW-11 navigation/render timeout from 10 seconds to 30 seconds so cold startup does not become a skip.
Raised FLOW-11 topology QA navigation timeout from 10 seconds to 30 seconds for the same cold-start guard.

commands.name: focused visual regeneration
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5174'; $env:CLIENT_URL='http://localhost:5174'; $env:VITE_API_URL='http://localhost:33001'; $env:SERVER_URL='http://localhost:33001'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/schema-registry-dag.spec.ts e2e/topology/schema-registry-dag-topology-qa.spec.ts -g "R-08|TVQ-10" --reporter=list; Pop-Location

commands.name: client TypeScript
commands.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false; Pop-Location

commands.name: FLOW-11 Playwright suites
commands.command: $env:VITE_PORT='5174'; $env:CLIENT_URL='http://localhost:5174'; $env:VITE_API_URL='http://localhost:33001'; $env:SERVER_URL='http://localhost:33001'; Push-Location client; npx playwright test e2e/schema-registry-dag.spec.ts e2e/topology/schema-registry-dag-topology-qa.spec.ts --reporter=list; Pop-Location
